# PartRenderer.AxisValues

**Class**

All the axis values applied to a part. The index is the axis number (determined by the loader). Axis values are in design space (-1.0…1.0)

## Declaration

```swift
class AxisValues
```

## Instance Properties

- **isNested**: Whether the axis values apply to a nested subpart or not

## Instance Methods

- **blendedValue(axis:)**: The final axis values applied to this subpart after the part has been rendered This is useful for detecting axes going out of range (-1.0…1.0)

## Conforms To

- Collection
- MutableCollection
- Sequence

items.description: Whether the axis values apply to a nested subpart or not
items.name: isNested
